title: Supreme Court backs SC voter map, rejects criticism it is unfair to Black voters
shortDescription: At issue is a coastal South Carolina district currently held by Rep. Nancy Mace, one of the Republicans who voted to oust former Speaker Kevin McCarthy.

title: On Truth Social, Trump posts are giving new energy to QAnon ideas
shortDescription: As Donald Trump campaigns against President Joe Biden, his online posts are reinvigorating a conspiracy theory that was a hallmark of his first term.

title: Michael Cohen stayed calm in Trump's trial, but will jurors believe him?
shortDescription: Despite his baggage as a volatile felon and convicted perjurer, the former Donald Trump fixer hit the key points prosecutors wanted, without a slipup

title: Senate border bill tees up key campaign opportunity for Democrats
shortDescription: The bill is sure to fail in the narrowly-divided chamber, where it needs at least 60 votes to pass.

title: 'The Apprentice': Inside Donald Trump's VP search
shortDescription: Past GOP presidential nominees gave vice presidential contenders surveys and dug into their personal finances. That isn't happening with Trump.

title: Bleach, Bibles, Truth Social stock: With taunts, Biden tries to trigger Trump
shortDescription: In a race against the ultimate name-caller, Biden is turning to his own bag of insults, one-liners and zingers to hit Donald Trump.

title: Nikki Haley says she'll vote for Trump
shortDescription: Former presidential candidate Nikki Haley announced that she will be voting for Donald Trump in the upcoming election in November.

title: Nikki Haley kind of endorses Donald Trump ... what does it mean?
shortDescription: Don't bet on the GOP rivals pairing up as running mates. But Haley's voting preference could undercut Biden's desire for her voters in November.

title: Trump ally Rick Scott running to lead Senate GOP in 2025
shortDescription: Scott ran against McConnell for the Senate GOP leadership job in 2022 and lost. Now McConnell is stepping down, and Scott is running again.

title: 'Drill, baby, drill:' Donald Trump raises money from the oil industry
shortDescription: Trump headlines a Houston fundraiser just weeks after telling industry leaders he would remove regulations and asking them for campaign donations.

title: Biden turns to memes to win over young voters
shortDescription: The Biden for President campaign posted a job listing Monday advertising a position for a "Content and Meme Pages Partner Manager."

title: Netanyahu ICC arrest warrant vote could splinter Democrats
shortDescription: House Republican leaders are preparing legislation to sanction the International Criminal Court for seeking arrest warrants against Israeli leaders.

title: White House State Dinner sneak peek
shortDescription: First Lady Jill Biden hosts a media preview in advance of the White House State Dinner for the Republic of Kenya.

title: Nikki Haley says she'll vote for Donald Trump in 2024 presidential race
shortDescription: Haley gave her blessing to her former GOP primary opponent after an address at the Hudson Institute on Wednesday.

title: OnPolitics: Trump falsely claims Biden DOJ was ready to take him out
shortDescription: Former President Donald Trump falsely claimed in a fundraising alert that Joe Biden's Justice Department was “locked & loaded ready to take me out."

title: Is Black voter support down for Biden?
shortDescription: USA TODAY reporter Francesca Chambers questions Biden advisor Stephen Benjamin on a suspected lack of enthusiasm from Black voters.

title: State dinner media preview at the White House
shortDescription: Jill Biden hosted a preview before Thursday's White House State Dinner for President William Ruto and First Lady Rachel Ruto of the Republic of Kenya.

title: Judge postpones Hunter Biden trial on tax charges to Sept. 5
shortDescription: A federal judge postponed Hunter Biden's trial on tax charges to give his lawyers more time to prepare after his first trial on gun charges.

title: Progressive Congressional Dems known as 'The Squad'
shortDescription: The progressive Democratic bloc has grown from four to nine members since 2018.

title: Hawaii will include two constitutional amendments in November election
shortDescription: Hawaii voters will decide on same-sex marriage rights and judicial appointment reforms, marking the first constitutional amendments since 2018.

title: Why Kari Lake's campaign says Senate victory in Arizona is within reach
shortDescription: After months of lagging in fundraising and public polling, Kari Lake's campaign sought to reset the U.S. Senate race expectations in Arizona.
